Meta.homeDescription: Liriun is your personal voice-first task assistant. It listens, organizes and reminds — no commands, no friction, on every device.

Hero.lead: Liriun listens, organizes and remembers. A personal productivity companion — no commands, no friction, on every device. In the making, invite-only.

Recursos.lead: Liriun isn't just a task app — it's an agent that learns your rhythm, your vocabulary and the contexts that matter to you.

voz.title: Voice-first organization
voz.desc: Speak the way you think. Liriun extracts title, due date, priority and category automatically — without you opening a keyboard.

agente.title: Personal agent
agente.desc: The assistant learns your habits: how you name projects, when you work and surfaces reminders at the right moment.

multi.title: Cross-platform
multi.desc: iOS, Android, web. Everything synced in real time, with the same considered experience — whichever device you open.

RecursosPage.title: Features
RecursosPage.description: Liriun listens, understands and organizes. An agent that gives your time back.
RecursosPage.lead: No commands. No friction. Speak the way you think — Liriun handles the rest.

voz.title: Speak the way you think.
voz.lead: Liriun pulls title, due date, priority and category from what you said — no keyboard required.

agente.title: Learns your rhythm.
agente.lead: How you name projects, when you work, what you tend to put off — it all becomes context to nudge you at the right time.

organizacao.title: Your day, three ways.
organizacao.lead: List, board or week. Categories with color. Recurrence in plain language — just say "every Tuesday".

privacidade.title: Your data is yours.
privacidade.lead: We don't train AI on your content. We don't sell it. We don't share it. JSON export in one click.

Precos.title: Pricing
Precos.description: Liriun plans — V1 free for everyone during the closed beta.
Precos.lead: Liriun is free during the closed beta. In 2027 we'll launch an optional Pro plan — without ever taking features away from the free plan.

free.name: Beta
free.tagline: Everything in Liriun, free during the closed beta.

pro.name: Pro
pro.tagline: More context, more memory, more integration.
features: Google Calendar and Apple Calendar integration

q1.q: Is the Beta plan really free forever?
q1.a: Yes. Whoever joins during the beta keeps the Beta plan at no cost, with no expiration.

q2.a: Targeting early 2027. You can join the waitlist with no commitment.

q3.a: Always. You can export everything in JSON at any time. None of your content is used to train AI.

q4.a: Beta is free. Pro will have a 14-day unconditional guarantee.

FooterCTA.title: Start talking to your day.
FooterCTA.lead: No credit card required. Closed beta — join with your invite.

Footer.tagline: Digital productivity companion. Crafted with care in São Paulo by ToMore.

Empresa.title: The company
Empresa.description: ToMore — the company behind Liriun. Founded in 2026 by Lucas Moreira and Pedro Tozaki in São Paulo.
Empresa.lead: In a world of endless notifications, never-ending lists and exhausted minds, ToMore was born in 2026 with a mission: to prove that well-designed technology can take care of people's minds — instead of the other way around.

founders.title: Two partners. One obsession with software done right.
founders.pedroBio: Software engineer, in love with systems that disappear at the right time. Leads product and architecture.
founders.lucasBio: Designer and strategist. Owns experience, brand and the relationship with the community.

missao.title: Give people their time back.
missao.p1: We believe productivity should not cost your mental health. Most apps are designed to capture attention; we want the opposite — software that disappears when the work is done.
missao.p2: ToMore is driven by a simple conviction: making people's lives easier is taking care of their minds. Every product decision starts with a question — does this add weight or take it off? Nothing ships in Liriun unless it serves less friction, less noise, less load.
missao.p3: That is why we built Liriun as a discreet companion: it listens, organizes, remembers. You go back to living, not managing lists.

produto.body: Liriun is our first product: a personal task organizer with conversational AI. More than a productivity app, it's a calm extension of your mind — and the first step of our mission to give people their time back.

valores.title: The principles that guide what we do.

v1.title: Light software, light life
v1.body: Well-built technology doesn't compete for attention. You open it when you need to; it steps back when you don't.

v2.title: Conversation before commands
v2.body: The most natural way to organize life is by talking about it. We replace forms with language whenever possible.

v3.title: Privacy is a right
v3.body: Your data is yours. We don't sell it, we don't train AI on it, we don't share it. When you leave, we wipe everything.

v4.title: People before product
v4.body: We measure success by how you feel — not by the time spent in the app. If you felt relieved, we got it right.

contato.title: We are here.
contato.body: For partnerships, press, suggestions or just to say hi — we're available at
contato.footer: We read every message. Reply within 48 business hours.

Termos.title: Terms of Service
Termos.description: Liriun Terms of Service — voice-first task assistant by ToMore.
Termos.notice: Document drafted under Brazilian Internet Bill of Rights (Law 12.965/2014), Consumer Code (Law 8.078/1990) and General Data Protection Law (Law 13.709/2018). Will be reviewed by digital-law counsel before public launch.

Privacidade.title: Privacy Policy
Privacidade.description: How Liriun collects, uses and protects your personal data — under Brazilian LGPD.
Privacidade.notice: Document drafted under LGPD (Law 13.709/2018), Brazilian Internet Bill of Rights (Law 12.965/2014) and ANPD guidance. Will be reviewed by digital-law counsel before public launch.

Aviso.bannerTexto: Liriun is in development (closed beta) — the screens and features shown are for demonstration and aren't all live yet.

Auth.recoverLead: We'll email a link for you to reset your password.
Auth.codigoBetaHint: Liriun is in closed beta. You need an invite code to create your account.
Auth.jaTemConta: I already have an account — sign in
Auth.aceitarTermos: I have read and accept the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
Auth.aceitarTermosPrefixo: I have read and accept the
Auth.erroAceiteTermos: You must accept the Terms and the Privacy Policy.
Auth.erroLogin: Login failed. Check email and password.
Auth.avisoServidor: Liriun is in development and runs on a free server hosted in the US during the beta. The first action after some idle time may take a few seconds while the server "wakes up", and you might notice slight latency. Thanks for your patience. 💜

Onboarding.title: How do you organize your tasks?
Onboarding.lead: Categories group tasks by context. Pick what makes sense — you can adjust later.
Onboarding.vazioErro: Pick or create at least one category.
